'''''Rebel Storm''''' was the first release of [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]'' game. It featured 60 miniature figures, each with corresponding statistics cards, based on the timeline of the [[original trilogy]]. This initial set was released on September 3, 2004 and has been reissued several times since. Miniatures could be purchased with in booster packs of 7 random minis, or a Starter Set, which contained 8 random minis, as well as "Luke Skywalker, Rebel," "Darth Vader, Dark Jedi," a rulebook, and a map based on the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].

''Rarity denoted as follows: Common (C), Uncommon (U), Rare (R), Very Rare (VR)''
